'''votalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phaeomelanic|phaeomelanic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phaeomelanic|phaeomelanic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| votalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:votalithi|votalithi]] || [[word:votaliji|votaliji]] || [[word:votalishi|votalishi]] || [[word:votaliki|votaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:votaluthuthu|votaluthuthu]] || [[word:votalujuju|votalujuju]] || [[word:votalushushu|votalushushu]] || [[word:votalukuku|votalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:votaluthu|votaluthu]] || [[word:votaluju|votaluju]] || [[word:votalushu|votalushu]] || [[word:votaluku|votaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:votalufthuf|votalufthuf]] || [[word:votalufjuf|votalufjuf]] || [[word:votalufshuf|votalufshuf]] || [[word:votalufkuf|votalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:votalethe|votalethe]] || [[word:votaleje|votaleje]] || [[word:votaleshe|votaleshe]] || [[word:votaleke|votaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:votalothotho|votalothotho]] || [[word:votalojojo|votalojojo]] || [[word:votaloshosho|votaloshosho]] || [[word:votalokoko|votalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:votalotho|votalotho]] || [[word:votalojo|votalojo]] || [[word:votalosho|votalosho]] || [[word:votaloko|votaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:votalofthof|votalofthof]] || [[word:votalofjof|votalofjof]] || [[word:votalofshof|votalofshof]] || [[word:votalofkof|votalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:votalÃŸfthÃŸf|votalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfjÃŸf|votalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfshÃŸf|votalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfkÃŸf|votalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:votalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|votalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|votalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|votalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|votalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:votalÃŸfthÃŸf|votalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfjÃŸf|votalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfshÃŸf|votalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfkÃŸf|votalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:votalÃŸfthÃŸf|votalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfjÃŸf|votalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfshÃŸf|votalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:votalÃŸfkÃŸf|votalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:votalÃḊthÃḊ|votalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:votalÃḊjÃḊ|votalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:votalÃḊshÃḊ|votalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:votalÃḊkÃḊ|votalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:votalathatha|votalathatha]] || [[word:votalajaja|votalajaja]] || [[word:votalashasha|votalashasha]] || [[word:votalakaka|votalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:votalatha|votalatha]] || [[word:votalaja|votalaja]] || [[word:votalasha|votalasha]] || [[word:votalaka|votalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:votalafthaf|votalafthaf]] || [[word:votalafjaf|votalafjaf]] || [[word:votalafshaf|votalafshaf]] || [[word:votalafkaf|votalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:votalasha|votalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:votalshÃḋsha|votalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:votalrosha|votalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:votalmusha|votalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:votalyasha|votalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govotalnkshÃḋsha|govotalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govotalnkrosha|govotalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govotalnkmusha|govotalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govotalnkyasha|govotalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:votatalasha|votatalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:votatalshÃḋsha|votatalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:votatalrosha|votatalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:votatalmusha|votatalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:votatalyasha|votatalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govotatalnkshÃḋsha|govotatalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govotatalnkrosha|govotatalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govotatalnkmusha|govotatalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govotatalnkyasha|govotatalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vetÃḊlasha|vetÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vetÃḊlshÃḋsha|vetÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vetÃḊlrosha|vetÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vetÃḊlmusha|vetÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vetÃḊlyasha|vetÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govetÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|govetÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govetÃḊlnkrosha|govetÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govetÃḊlnkmusha|govetÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govetÃḊlnkyasha|govetÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:votfalasha|votfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:votfalshÃḋsha|votfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:votfalrosha|votfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:votfalmusha|votfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:votfalyasha|votfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govotfalnkshÃḋsha|govotfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govotfalnkrosha|govotfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govotfalnkmusha|govotfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govotfalnkyasha|govotfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
